content: Fluent in English, French, Spanish and German, Paul Morphy was one of the most learned chess players of his time.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Parlando fluentemente inglese, francese, spagnolo e tedesco, Paul Morphy fu uno dei giocatori di scacchi più colti del s
